message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, Zap, Star, Search, Settings } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'

export const metadata = {
  title: "anime tactical simulator trait reroll: Complete Strategy Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the anime tactical simulator trait reroll system. Learn where to find the Trait Manager, the best traits for Mythic units, and how to farm reroll tokens in 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Trait+Reroll+Strategy+2026",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Primary Mechanic**: The **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** system allows players to modify unit stats including damage, cooldown, and training speed.
- **Location**: Visit the **Trait Manager** located behind the PLAYTIME area, right next to the Hospital in the main lobby.
- **Best Strategy**: Avoid heavy rerolling in the early game; save your Premium Rerolls for **Mythic and Secret units** in World 3 or later.
- **Top Tier Traits**: Aim for **Atomic** (0.05% chance) or **Angelic** for end-game content to maximize universal damage and survivability.
- **Resource Tip**: Use active codes like `DISCORD` and `UPDATE1` to secure free Talent and Premium Rerolls instantly.
</Callout>

In the competitive landscape of Roblox squad builders, mastering the **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** system is the definitive factor between a standard team and a top-tier leaderboard squad. Traits function as permanent stat modifiers that can drastically increase your unit's damage output, defense, or training efficiency. As of the March 2026 update, the meta has shifted toward high-utility traits that offer more than just raw power, such as idle gem gains or AOE crowd control.

This comprehensive guide breaks down every aspect of the trait system, from finding the elusive Trait Manager to understanding the complex rarity tiers. Whether you are a new player looking to optimize your first Legendary pull or a veteran aiming for a "Perfect" Atomic trait on a Secret unit, the following strategies will ensure you spend your Reroll Tokens with maximum efficiency. We will explore the mathematical advantages of specific traits and provide a roadmap for when to invest your hard-earned resources.

<Section icon={Map} title="Locating the Trait Manager and Reroll Basics">

Before you can begin your journey with the **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** process, you must know exactly where to go. Unlike summons which are centrally located, the Trait Manager is tucked away in a specific corner of the lobby.

**How to find the Trait Manager:**
1. Enter the main lobby area.
2. Look for the **PLAYTIME** rewards stand.
3. Move behind the PLAYTIME area toward the **Hospital** building.
4. The Trait Manager NPC is stationed just outside the Hospital entrance.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Reroll Tokens">
    The standard currency for basic trait changes. These are frequently rewarded through daily missions and world progression.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Premium Rerolls">
    Used for higher-tier units. These offer better odds for rare traits and are primarily obtained via codes or the premium shop.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Talent Rerolls">
    Distinct from standard traits, these modify the base talents of a unit, which are further enhanced by Stat Cubes from Raids.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="warning" title="Resource Management">
Do not use your Premium Rerolls on Rare or Epic units. Even if you are struggling in World 1, these resources are far too valuable to waste on units that will be fused or sold within a few hours of gameplay.
</Callout>

| Resource Type | Primary Source | Best Use Case |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Reroll Token** | Daily Missions / World Quests | Legendary units in Mid-game |
| **Premium Reroll** | Codes / Special Events | Mythic and Secret units only |
| **Talent Reroll** | Raid Rewards / Milestones | End-game talent optimization |

</Section>

<Section icon={Star} title="Trait Rarity and Stat Breakdown">

Understanding the hierarchy of traits is essential for successful **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** sessions. Traits are categorized by their rarity, ranging from common 10% drops to the ultra-rare 0.05% Atomic trait. Each trait provides a percentage-based boost to specific training types (Strength, Energy, Weapon, Defense, or Speed) and direct combat buffs.

The training boosts are particularly important in 2026, as they accelerate how quickly your units gain power during idle periods or active grinding.

**Common and Uncommon Traits (Tier I & II):**

| Trait Name | Rarity | Training Boost | Combat Effect |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Brawler I** | 10% | Strength: 5% | Strength Power Damage: +5% |
| **Guardian I** | 10% | Defense: 5% | Universal Damage Reduction: 2.5% |
| **Swordsman I** | 10% | Weapon: 5% | Weapon Power Damage: +5% |
| **Agile II** | 5.5% | Speed/Jump: 10% | Movement Speed: +5% |
| **Meditator II** | 5.5% | Energy: 10% | Energy Power Damage: +10% |

<Callout type="tip" title="Stat Synergy">
Match your traits to the unit's base power type. For example, a unit with Strength-based attacks should always aim for Brawler or Avenger traits rather than Meditator.
</Callout>

**Advanced and Unique Traits:**

| Trait Name | Rarity | Special Mechanics |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Assassin** | 2% | 10% chance to dodge all incoming attacks |
| **Avenger** | 2% | Increases M1 damage from Strength/Sword by 30% |
| **Speedster** | 2% | +20 Walk Speed / +15 Fly Speed (can exceed max) |
| **Warrior** | 0.8% | Damage reduction increases as Health drops |
| **Galactic** | 0.3% | 15% chance to release AOE stun shockwave on hit |
| **Angelic** | 0.2% | Heals 50% HP when below 10% Health (5m CD) |
| **Golden** | 0.1% | Increases Coin/Yen Gain by 20% |
| **Atomic** | 0.05% | +50% Universal Damage / +2 Idle Gem Gain |

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Step-by-Step Reroll Procedure">

Once you have secured your Reroll Tokens and identified the unit you wish to upgrade, follow these steps to perform an **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** safely.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Inventory Audit">
    Check your inventory to ensure you have enough Reroll Tokens or Premium Rerolls. You should generally have at least 10–20 tokens before attempting to roll for a specific Tier III trait.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Navigate to Hospital">
    Teleport or walk to the Hospital area behind the PLAYTIME rewards. Interact with the Trait Manager NPC to open the reroll interface.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Select Unit">
    Drag your desired unit into the reroll slot. Double-check that you haven't selected a unit you intend to fuse or sell for Souls.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Execute Reroll">
    Click the 'Reroll' button. Note that the new trait will automatically overwrite the old one. There is no "cancel" or "keep old trait" option in the current 2026 build.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Verify Stats">
    Open your unit details page to confirm the new stat modifiers are active. Training boosts should reflect immediately in your training gains.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="success" title="Ideal Outcome">
If you hit any trait with a rarity of 0.8% or lower (Warrior, Galactic, Angelic, Golden, Atomic), **stop immediately**. These are considered "God Rolls" and should never be rerolled unless you are an extreme end-game player chasing a specific niche build.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Zap} title="Progression-Based Rerolling Strategy">

Your approach to the **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** system must evolve as you progress through the worlds. Spending resources too early will stall your growth in World 3, where enemy HP jumps significantly.

**Early Game (World 1-2):**
Focus entirely on stage clearance. Use any units you pull, focusing on rarity (Legendary/Mythic) rather than traits. If you receive free rerolls from codes like `RELEASE`, use them only if you pull an early Mythic. Otherwise, hoard them.

**Mid Game (World 3-4):**
This is where traits begin to matter. As you farm raids for Stat Cubes, having traits like **Brawler III** or **Swordsman III** will help you clear mobs faster. Aim for "Good Enough" traits (2% - 5% rarity) to stabilize your farming speed.

**Late Game (World 5+ & Raids):**
This is the optimization phase. You should be using Premium Rerolls to chase **Atomic** or **Angelic** traits for your core Mythic team.

<Checklist
  id="reroll-priority"
  title="Reroll Priority List:"
  items={[
    "Save all Premium Rerolls for Mythic units",
    "Prioritize Damage traits (Brawler/Swordsman) for main DPS",
    "Equip Golden traits on farming units to boost Yen gain",
    "Use Angelic or Warrior traits on frontline/tank units",
    "Avoid rerolling for Speedster unless movement is a bottleneck"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="info" title="Pro Strategy">
If you pull the **Golden** trait early, keep that unit specifically for farming lower-level stages. The 20% Coin gain bonus is additive and scales massively when combined with 2x Gold gamepasses.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="How to Obtain More Reroll Resources">

To maintain a consistent **anime tactical simulator trait reroll** schedule, you need a steady stream of tokens. While the shop offers them for Gems, there are several F2P (Free to Play) methods to stay stocked.

| Method | Frequency | Reward Type |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Active Codes** | Monthly Updates | Premium & Talent Rerolls |
| **Daily Missions** | Every 24 Hours | Standard Reroll Tokens |
| **Tower Mode** | Milestone Floors | Gems (to buy tokens) |
| **Raid Medals** | Repeatable | Exchange for Reroll Bundles |
| **Discord/Group Join** | Once | 2-3 Premium Rerolls |

**Farming Tips for 2026:**
- **Join the Official Group**: Many codes like `DISCORD` are locked behind group membership. Joining grants instant access to 2 Premium Rerolls.
- **Tower Floor 50/100**: These floors provide significant Gem rewards. Use these Gems to purchase Reroll Bundles in the shop during "Luck Event" weekends.
- **Raid Efficiency**: Only farm raids once you have 3-4 Mythic units. Use the medals to buy Talent Rerolls first, as these provide permanent account-wide power via the Talent system.

<Callout type="warning" title="Code Expiration">
Codes in Anime Tactical Simulator expire quickly. Always check the official Discord or the Wiki's "Active Codes" section as soon as a new update drops to claim your rerolls before they are gone.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Can I lock a trait and reroll others?",
    answer: "No, as of the 2026 update, units only have one trait slot. Rerolling replaces the existing trait entirely. Make sure you are committed to losing the current buff before clicking reroll."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best trait for AFK farming?",
    answer: "The Atomic trait is the absolute best for AFK farming because it provides a +2 Idle Gem Gain. If you cannot get Atomic, the Golden trait is the next best choice for increasing Yen income while grinding stages."
  },
  {
    question: "Does the trait rarity affect the unit's evolution?",
    answer: "No, traits do not carry over or influence the evolution process in a way that changes the outcome. However, you generally want to evolve your unit first and then perform the anime tactical simulator trait reroll to ensure you aren't wasting resources on a base form you might replace."
  },
  {
    question: "Where is the Trait Manager located exactly?",
    answer: "The Trait Manager is found in the main lobby, specifically behind the PLAYTIME area and next to the Hospital building. Walk past the summon area toward the back-right corner to find him."
  }
]} />

</Section>
